subject: Experience The Times, Anywhere. Starting at just $5 for 12 Weeks
body:
View in browser:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTJXY1B81HXJB842jKAAwENcPZ/viwb?t_params=EMAIL%3Djeeproject%2540yahoo.com%26REGI_ID%3D47275261

-----------------------------------------------------------------

-- THE NEW YORK TIMES --

ACCESS INSPIRING JOURNALISM
AND INSIGHTFUL PERSPECTIVES
ANYTIME, ANYWHERE

-----------------------------------------------------------------

TRY A DIGITAL SUBSCRIPTION FOR JUST $5 FOR 12 WEEKS.

For the most reliable, comprehensive journalism, nothing 
compares to The Times. Get a deeper understanding of the world 
and exclusive insights that enrich your personal and professional 
life. With a digital subscription, you'll have unlimited access 
to the newly redesigned NYTimes.com plus full access to our 
smartphone or tablet apps, or both. Stay informed, get inspired, 
and satisfy your far-reaching curiosity.

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTJXY1B81HXJB842jKAAwENcPZ/sub1

-----------------------------------------------------------------

TRAVEL WITH TIMES JOURNEYS: EXPERT INSIGHT,
ACCESS AND DISCUSSION.

Choose from 21 small group tours whose trip styles cover 
luxury, active or travel focused on knowledge. Our handpicked 
experts will join every departure and share their expertise 
with you.

Tour Highlights Include:

-- China: Access to closed halls in The Forbidden City

-- Provence: Picnic amongst the famous vines of Chateauneuf-du-Pape

-- Israel/Palestine: Hear firsthand accounts from intelligence analysts

LEARN MORE:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTJXY1B81HXJB842jKAAwENcPZ/tjbut

-----------------------------------------------------------------

You received this email because you are a registered user 
of The New York Times. 

Digital Subscriptions: Promotional offers valid for new 
subscribers only. New York Times digital subscriptions are 
sold separately from e-reader editions, Premium Crosswords 
and The New York Times Crosswords apps. Mobile apps are not 
supported on all devices. You will be billed $5 for the 
first 12 weeks up front which is nonrefundable. After the 
first 12 weeks, all subscriptions will automatically renew 
and your credit card or PayPal account will be charged in 
advance of each four-week billing period unless canceled. 
If the subscription is canceled, refunds and termination of 
access will follow the Terms of Sale policy. Prices are in 
U.S. dollars and are subject to change. Other restrictions 
and taxes may apply. 

Times Journeys: All terms and conditions can be found at: 
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTJXY1B81HXJB842jKAAwENcPZ/tjtc 
or you can call 855-NYT-7979 and request a copy to be sent 
to you. Abercrombie & Kent CST# 2007274-20, Mountain Travel 
CST# 2014882-10, Academic Travel Abroad CST# 2059002-40 

To ensure delivery of e-mails from The New York Times, please
add nytimes@e.newyorktimesinfo.com to your address book.

The New York Times:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTJXY1B81HXJB842jKAAwENcPZ/nyt

Privacy Policy:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTJXY1B81HXJB842jKAAwENcPZ/privacy

Contact Us:
help@nytimes.com

Unsubscribe:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTJXY1B81HXJB842jKAAwENcPZ/unsub?email=jeeproject@yahoo.com&REGI_ID=47275261
